videos.title: Classic Cross-Country Skiing for Beginners: Everything You Need to Know to Get Started || REI
videos.description:
Classic Cross-Country skiing offers something for everyone, from exercise to beautiful winter scenery. We partnered with Greg Rhodes of the Professional Ski Instructors of America (PSIA) to give you all the basics for your first day on the trail so you'll be gliding over the snow with ease in no time.

Before Putting Skis On :29
Moving on Flat Ground 1:09
Pole Basics 3:12
Going Uphill 6:35
Going Downhill 8:07
Turning 10:52
Getting Up from a Fall 12:03

videos.title: Oka Ski 2012 clips de la course
2013 Gatineau Loppet 55k Classic Race Review
videos.description:
ActiveSteve, not even recovered from tackling the Canadian Ski Marathon the week before, heads back out with his skis on to cover another classic Canadian ski event, the Gatineau Loppet, heading into it's 35th year. To commemorate the 35th year, the Classic event featured a 55km and 38km linear (point-to-point) route instead of the normal looped course. Under brilliant skies and great snow conditions, he lined up with participants from around the world. Check out the video to see how is all unrolled.

Music: Dan-O Songs
videos.transcript:
[Music]

videos.title: Minni-Loppet Helps Young Skiers Learn To Explore
videos.description: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey was there Saturday to encourage the young skiers (1:02). WCCO Sunday Morning – Jan. 28, 2018
